rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §21.353, which governs teacher appraisal based on classroom teaching performance. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A teacher who directs extracurricular activities in addition to performing classroom teaching duties shall be appraised only on the basis of classroom teaching performance and not on performance in connection with the extracurricular activities.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule concerns teacher performance appraisal and has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions.
